violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black (test was run with facility thermolabels as well). Kitchen staff are to sanitize equipment in the 3 bay sink until dish machine is service/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The flow pressure of the fresh hot water sanitizing rinse (PSI) was not between 15-25 PSI as required. Dish Machine Sanitizing Cycle was observed to be operating at 32 PSI at the time of inspection. Dish Machine is to be adjusted to the proper PSI range. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

At the time of inspection, sanitizing spray bottles used for bleach mixture were not labeled. Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
At the time of inspection, the non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
